label: Regularization, dropout & weight decay

node.label: Regularization, dropout & weight decay
node.definition: Regularization constrains effective model capacity through penalties, dropout, noise, early stopping, label smoothing, or restrictions on learned functions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Regularization, dropout & weight decay is to connect Statistics & experimental design, Optimization theory to downstream capabilities including Large-scale pretraining.
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Optimization theory.

dependencies.rationale: Regularization, dropout & weight decay uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Regularization, dropout & weight decay uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Regularization, dropout & weight decay uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
